SYANO — FINAL WORKFLOW ELIMINATION AUDIT

Goal:

After a completely fresh GitHub Import into a brand-new Replit workspace:

ONLY these workflows may exist:

1. API Server
2. Marketplace
3. Mobile App
4. Embedding Service

Nothing else.

Specifically eliminate:

* Start application
* Duplicate Marketplace
* Duplicate API Server
* Component Preview Server
* Any auto-generated artifact workflow
* Any extra Preview target

Rules:

Do NOT update documentation.

Do NOT update AGENT_BOOTSTRAP.

Do NOT update recovery files.

Do NOT implement features.

Instead:

PHASE 1

Perform root-cause analysis of Replit workflow generation.

Identify exactly why Replit is creating:

* Start application
* Marketplace duplicates
* API Server duplicates
* Preview artifacts

PHASE 2

Inspect:

* .replit
* package.json
* workspace package.json files
* artifacts/*
* tools/*
* build commands
* run commands
* preview commands

Find every trigger that causes workflow auto-generation.

PHASE 3

Remove workflow-generation triggers from the codebase itself.

The solution must be structural.

Not documentation.

Not instructions.

Not recovery guides.

PHASE 4

Simulate a completely fresh GitHub Import.

Pretend you are a brand-new Replit Agent.

Verify exactly what workflows would appear.

PHASE 5

If any workflow other than:

* API Server
* Marketplace
* Mobile App
* Embedding Service

would still appear,

the audit FAILS.

Continue fixing until only the 4 official workflows remain.

PHASE 6

Verify Mobile App.

Requirements:

* Mobile App must start successfully on first import.
* No manual restart.
* No reinstall.
* No workflow reset.
* No pnpm repair.

The Mobile workflow must succeed from a fresh import.

PHASE 7

Verify Marketplace.

Requirements:

* Only one Marketplace workflow exists.
* No Start application workflow.
* No duplicate web workflow.

PHASE 8

Produce a final report:

WORKFLOW_CERTIFICATION.md

Include:

* workflows before
* workflows after
* exact root causes
* exact fixes
* fresh import simulation result

Success criteria:

Fresh GitHub Import
→ Install
→ Boot

Results:

API Server ✅
Marketplace ✅
Mobile App ✅
Embedding Service ✅

Nothing else exists.
